{{DISPLAYTITLE:Villager Esports Pro Invitational 2021: Group Stage}} {{Tabs static|this=1 |name1=Group Stage|link1=Villager_Esports_Pro_Invitational/2021/Group_Stage |name2=Grand Finals|link2=Villager_Esports_Pro_Invitational/2021/Grand_Finals }} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Villager Esports Pro Invitational 2021: Group Stage |tickername=VEPI 2021: Group Stage |shortname=2021: Group Stage |image=VE Pro Invitational Logo.png |type=Online |team_number=27 |series=Villager Esports Pro Invitational |organizer=Villager Esports |organizer-link=https://villageresports.in/ |sponsor=[https://www.facebook.com/gaming/feed/ Facebook Gaming] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=50,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-09-19 |edate=2021-09-21 |twitter= |instagram=villageresports |web=https://villageresports.in/ |discord=villageresports |facebook=villageresports |youtube=channel/UCciMkz3TP6MldcX_Cw7-PWA |previous=Villager_Esports_Pro_Invitational/2020{{!}}VE Invitational - 2020 }} '''[https://villageresports.in/ Villager Esports]''' in association with '''[https://www.facebook.com/gaming/feed/ Facebook Gaming]''' present the second iteration of the ''Villager Esports Pro Inviational'' called the ''Villager Esports'' called the '''''Villager Esports Pro Invitational 2021''''' with a prize pool of ₹1,50,000 INR. The ''Group Stage'' features a prize pool of ₹50,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator |lang=India |b1=Fritzz |b2=SardarjiYT |b2flag=in|b2name=Harshdeep Singh }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Villager Esports Pro Invitational 2021 Group Stage: '''19th September to 21st September, 2021'' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' * ''27 Teams divided into 3 groups '' (A, B, and C) * '' 9 Teams in each group'' * ''Teams will compete in a round robin format'' * ''18 Matches to be played over a period of 3 days (Each team to play 12 Matches).'' * ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''Top 18 teams '''}} from the overall standings will advance to [[Villager_Esports_Pro_Invitational/2021/Grand_Finals|Grand Finals]]''. ====Matchdays==== * ''3 Matchdays: 6 Matches to be played each day .'' ** '''''19th September (Sunday)''''': ''2x(AB + CA + BC) {E>>M>>S>>E>>M>>S}'' ** '''''20th September (Monday)''''': ''2x(AB + CA + BC) {M>>S>>E>>M>>S>>E}'' ** '''''21st September (Tuesday)''''': ''2x(AB + CA + BC) {S>>E>>M>>S>>E>>M}'' ====Points
